parsedContent.title: Primary School Exam
parsedContent.description: A comprehensive exam for primary school students

questions.text: What is the name of the school?
Who does Keza walk to school with?
How long does it take Keza to reach school?
What is Keza’s favourite subject?
Why does Keza like the subject?
Mention two things found at Keza’s school.
What does Keza do after lessons?
Do you enjoy playing with friends after school? Why?
Match the word 'Doctor' with its meaning.

options.text: A person who treats sick people
A place where people buy and sell things

questions.text: Match the word 'School' with its meaning.

options.text: A person who treats sick people
A place where people buy and sell things

questions.text: Match the word 'Market' with its meaning.

options.text: A person who treats sick people
A place where people buy and sell things

questions.text: Match the word 'Library' with its meaning.

options.text: A person who treats sick people
A place where people buy and sell things

questions.text: Match the word 'Farmer' with its meaning.

options.text: A person who treats sick people
A place where people buy and sell things

questions.text: Fill in the blank: We read books in the ____________.
Fill in the blank: Children play football in the ____________.
Fill in the blank: It is ____________ today. I can see the sun.
Fill in the blank: The girls are ____________ songs.
Fill in the blank: We carry umbrellas when it is ____________.
Write the negative form of the sentence: She likes English.
Write the negative form of the sentence: They play football every day.
questions.correctAnswer: They do not play football every day.

questions.text: Write the negative form of the sentence: He walks to school.
questions.correctAnswer: He does not walk to school.

questions.text: Write the negative form of the sentence: We study Mathematics.
Write the negative form of the sentence: Aline enjoys dancing.
Write a question using the words: you / like / English
Write a question using the words: she / go / to school
Write a question using the words: they / play / football
Write a question using the words: he / enjoy / reading
Write a question using the words: we / study / Science
Fill in the blank with the correct form of the verb: She ____________ (walk) to school every day.
Fill in the blank with the correct form of the verb: We ____________ (study) English on Monday.
Fill in the blank with the correct form of the verb: He ____________ (like) football.
Fill in the blank with the correct form of the verb: They ____________ (play) in the playground.
Fill in the blank with the correct form of the verb: Does she ____________ (teach) English?
Choose the correct answer: There ____ many books in the library.
Choose the correct answer: The school is ____ the market.
Choose the correct answer: It ____ rainy yesterday.
Choose the correct answer: She is taller ____ Aline.
Choose the correct answer: I am going to ____ my grandmother.
Mention four types of weather.
What do people wear when it is cold?
What was the weather like yesterday? Write one sentence.
Why is weather important?
Write five sentences about your school.
Write five sentences about what you did last weekend.
Write two ways you can help keep your school clean.
Write two qualities of a good friend.
Why is it important to come to school on time?
